title: KOM'S Torchflowers
description: Resource Pack that makes torchflowers look less "exotic" and more "natural", so you can fit them in more buildings!
body:
# **KOM'S Torchflowers** 
This pack overhauls torchflowers so you can use them in your buildings more often!

Dislike how off-place these flowers look? This pack is for you!

---

![Comparison between old and new texture](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/YB68EcHc/images/f15b71c3ce00d846a29b30073f741791d4c5b1b8.jpeg)
